title: CiRunPayload
description: Payload of a state.event with type=ci-run. Produced by ci-runner for each workflow_job phase transition.

ref.description: Branch or tag that triggered the run.

workflow.description: Workflow name as reported by GitHub.

jobName.description: Specific job name within the workflow.

phase.description: Lifecycle phase matching the GitHub workflow_job action.

conclusion.description: Terminal outcome; present only when phase=completed.

runnerLabels.description: Labels on the runner that executed the job.
